_comment: Real-world BTS tour data (group tour + solo/OT7 tours). Loaded by `flask seed-concerts` (see app/cli.py). starts_at times default to 18:00 local where the source schedule had no published time — update if official times are confirmed. Hiroshima Green Arena (Wings Tour) is a best-guess venue name/coords, lower confidence than the rest.

tours.name: string, unique — the natural key used to match an existing tour

concerts.name: string
concerts.timezone: IANA timezone name for the venue, e.g. Asia/Seoul
